description: Finance/trading subagents (finance-data-fetcher, finance-analyst, finance-debater) — market data retrieval, technical/fundamental analysis, bull/bear challenge.

cases.prompt: Retrieve the current price and P/E ratio for Apple (AAPL).
Get the latest quarterly revenue and net income for Microsoft (MSFT).
Perform a technical analysis of Tesla (TSLA) using RSI, MACD, and moving averages.
Do a fundamental analysis of Amazon (AMZN): valuation, growth, profitability.
Assess market sentiment around Nvidia (NVDA) given recent earnings.
Make the strongest bull case for investing in Google (GOOGL).
Make the strongest bear case against Meta (META). Identify the key risks.
Build an investment thesis for a 3-year hold on Berkshire Hathaway (BRK.B).
Get the current market cap and 24h volume for Bitcoin (BTC).
Given a bull thesis (AI tailwinds) and bear thesis (valuation stretched) for Microsoft, weigh both and give a verdict.
